```text
<id>
```

### Version

```text
<version>
```

- [ ] New Project Type
- [ ] Update Existing Project Type

```text
<summary>
```

### Detection Rules

#### Markers

```text
<markers>
```

#### Languages

### Validation

- [ ] Filename matches project type ID
- [ ] Version follows semantic versioning
- [ ] Version was incremented (if updating an existing project type)
- [ ] Detection rules were validated locally

### Contribution Policy

- [ ] This PR modifies exactly one project type
- [ ] This PR does not modify any toolchains
- [ ] No unrelated files were modified
